% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!

10. ~share(karen,stranger_things,lisa) [negated conjecture 9]
11. ~share(karen,stranger_things,lisa) [flattening 10]
12. ! [X0] : (binge_watch(karen,X0) | (~netflix_show(X0) | ~popular(X0))) [ennf transformation 3]

16. ! [X0] : (share(karen,X0,lisa) | ~netflix_show(X0) | ~binge_watch(karen,X0)) [flattening 15]
18. netflix_show(stranger_things) [cnf transformation 1]
19. popular(stranger_things) [cnf transformation 2]
20. binge_watch(karen,X0) | ~netflix_show(X0) | ~popular(X0) [cnf transformation 13]
25. share(karen,X0,lisa) | ~netflix_show(X0) | ~binge_watch(karen,X0) [cnf transformation 16]
27. ~share(karen,stranger_things,lisa) [cnf transformation 11]
34. ~netflix_show(stranger_things) | ~binge_watch(karen,stranger_things) [resolution 25,27]
35. ~binge_watch(karen,stranger_things) [forward subsumption resolution 34,18]
36. ~netflix_show(stranger_things) | ~popular(stranger_things) [resolution 35,20]
37. ~popular(stranger_things) [forward subsumption resolution 36,18]
38. $false [forward subsumption resolution 37,19]

% Termination reason: Refutation
